query:
SELECT al.target_id, al.action, al.created_at, al.user_id
FROM audit_log al
WHERE al.action = 'BILLING_EVENT_FAILED'
ORDER BY al.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Me9dVE4fH3ZyTq.ed3df32c863d --database cTdrattvNQ95XCgX9zeyNM --execute SELECT al.target_id, al.action, al.created_at, al.user_id
FROM audit_log al
WHERE al.action = 'BILLING_EVENT_FAILED'

LIMIT 20;
